subcodes.first_line: I testify to Thy oneness and singleness, and that no peer or likeness hath ever existed for Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهادت میدهم بوحدانیت و فردانیت تو و باینکه از برای تو شبه و مثلی نبوده و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @Satan; the Evil One, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
